intent_nl: Convert the Stripe event's `created` Unix epoch timestamp into an ISO-8601 UTC datetime string, e.g. 1752364800 becomes "2025-07-13T00:00:00Z".

samples.intent_nl: Convert the Stripe event's `created` Unix epoch timestamp into an ISO-8601 UTC datetime string, e.g. 1752364800 becomes "2025-07-13T00:00:00Z".

coverage.description: Convert a Unix epoch timestamp to an ISO-8601 UTC datetime string.
